info.title: Asset/Asset Failure Type Prediction API with CMMS GET calls
info.description:
Current API contract based on app/main.py and app/schemas.py.
All request IDs are integers (int64).

post.summary: Queue an asset failure type prediction job

get.summary: CMMS: List asset failure types by asset
CMMS: Get asset failure type operations

CmmsOperation.description: CMMS operation item (operation_id sometimes comes as 'opareation_id').
